questions.question: Choose the correct idiom for the word highlighted in bold. Since Jatin purchased his new gaming console, he has turned into a true couch potato, watching TV for hours.
options: A person who eats only potatoes.
A person who spends a lot of time sitting and watching TV.
questions.answer: A person who spends a lot of time sitting and watching TV.

Option B: A person who exercises regularly. does not best fit the requirement of the question.
